text: A person on a surfboard is riding a large wave
A blue train emerging from a stand of trees.
A little girl standing in the snow holding skis in her arms.
a sub sandwich on a plate with a bowl of pickles

A bathroom with a tile floor, bathtub and shower and no shower curtain.
